title: Update EdhocInitiator callsites for new edhoc_kdf (lines ~648,711,741,751,827 etc) and clean duplicate code blocks
description: In rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs, update all edhoc_kdf invocations in begin_process_message_2, finish_process_message_2, process_message_2_with_credential etc. to new (prk, th, label_str, context, len). Remove the broken duplicate implementations around lines 782-872 that have undefined vars and mixed styles. Ensure TH computation uses transcript_* helpers consistently.
